briefing_preview: Monday opened the week with a quiet risk-on tone as SPY and QQQ notched modest gains while Bitcoin recovered from last week's pullback. The macro calendar was light, allowing markets to digest Friday's mixed payroll print without major volatility…

Markets closed mixed on Tuesday as tech continued its leadership role while small-caps lagged on renewed regional bank jitters. The Nasdaq-composite proxy QQQ gained 1.1% and SPY added 0.8%, while IWM fell 0.4% — a divergence that historically signals late-cycle sector rotation…
